title: JavaScript Array Methods
description: Functional array methods allow declarative data transformations. Key methods include map(), filter(), and reduce().
codeBlock:
const numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
const doubledEvens = numbers
  .filter(n => n % 2 === 0)
  .map(n => n * 2); // [4, 8]
details: Array methods like map and filter return a new array instead of mutating the original array, which promotes immutability and functional programming patterns.
